arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea won race for wonderkid transfer despite “significant” PSG effort, claims expert
arts.sum: Chelsea were able to see off competition from Paris Saint-Germain for the transfer of Palmeiras wonderkid Estevao Willian, according to Jonathan Johnson. Speaking exclusively to CaughtOffside for his latest Daily Briefing column, Johnson provided some insight into how hard PSG also tried to sign Estevao when they were looking at him and other talented young […] The post Exclusive: Chelsea won race for wonderkid transfer despite “significant” PSG effort, claims expert appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Maresca tells Chelsea signing 'he's not the main player'
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has told Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall that he must fight for his place as he is no longer 'the main player' he was at Leicester. Speaking to the media ahead of Chelsea's clash with League Two side Barrow in the Carabao Cup, Maresca told Dewsbury-Hall that he needs to come to grips with no longer being 'the main player.'

arts.ttl: 'A really good fit': Chris Sutton raves about 'excellent' Chelsea player who's perfect for them

arts.ttl: Opinion: Pat Nevin probably correct on Moises Caicedo, for now
arts.sum: Former Chelsea winger Pat Nevin has been complimenting Moises Caicedo this weekend after another fine performance against West Ham. But he is refusing to be drawn too much into the N’Golo Kante comparisons yet. Chelsea fans were comparing Caicedo to N’Golo Kante following his excellent display against West Ham. However, Nevin does not think he is […]

arts.sum: Tonight will almost certainly prove a great opportunity for Enzo Maresca to get a good look at some of the members of his Chelsea squad...

arts.ttl: Chelsea inform trio what they must do to salvage their futures at the club
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly informed the likes of Mykhailo Mudryk, Noni Madueke, and Christopher Nkunku that they will have to fight for their future at the club. The three players have not been able to live up to the expectations since their big money moves to Stamford Bridge and Chelsea are prepared to sanction their departures […] The post Chelsea inform trio what they must do to salvage their futures at the club appeared first on CaughtOffside.
